name: zid-theme-builder
description: Build complete E2E custom Zid/Vitrin themes with store understanding, sector identity, merchant-friendly visual prompts, logical asset planning, validation, root-valid ZIP delivery, and optional Claude Code deployment.
notes: Themes are built ON a fresh clone of growth-theme per project (never from a bundled scaffold). References are load-on-demand; scripts validate + package the upload ZIP.
